task_completion.description: Navigate to the correct week in the Odoo Calendar
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Odoo Calendar app interface showing the week that includes 'Friday of next week' (the week following the upcoming Monday).

task_completion.description: Create the IT Setup event with the correct title and time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a calendar block or an event creation form titled 'IT Setup - Sarah Connor' scheduled from 09:00 to 10:00 on Friday.

task_completion.description: Set the correct location and attendee for the IT Setup event
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the event details or form for the IT Setup event showing 'IT Helpdesk' in the location field and 'David Chen' in the attendees field.

task_completion.description: Create the HR Benefits Orientation event with the correct title and time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a calendar block or an event creation form titled 'HR Benefits Orientation - Sarah Connor' scheduled from 10:00 to 11:00 on Friday.

task_completion.description: Set the correct location and attendee for the HR Benefits Orientation event
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the event details or form for the HR Benefits event showing 'HR Office' in the location field and 'Grace Patel' in the attendees field.

task_completion.description: Create the Welcome Lunch event with the correct title and time
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a calendar block or an event creation form titled 'Welcome Lunch - Sarah Connor' scheduled from 12:00 to 13:30 on Friday.

task_completion.description: Set the correct location and attendee for the Welcome Lunch event
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the event details or form for the Welcome Lunch event showing 'Northbridge Cafeteria' in the location field and 'Alice Johnson' in the attendees field.

integrity.description: The agent used the Odoo web interface to create the events
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the screenshots show interaction with the Odoo Calendar web application in a browser, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answers into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the event details are entered into the actual Odoo event creation forms, not just written in a notepad or text file.

integrity.description: The events are genuinely placed on the calendar grid
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the final screenshots show the events as actual blocks on the Odoo calendar grid or as successfully saved event records.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target events to verify: 1) 'IT Setup - Sarah Connor' (09:00-10:00, Location: IT Helpdesk, Attendee: David Chen). 2) 'HR Benefits Orientation - Sarah Connor' (10:00-11:00, Location: HR Office, Attendee: Grace Patel). 3) 'Welcome Lunch - Sarah Connor' (12:00-13:30, Location: Northbridge Cafeteria, Attendee: Alice Johnson). All events must be scheduled on Friday of next week in the Odoo Calendar.
